author: doll-agent
content:
Added 6 property tests covering Cholesky and LU decomposition invariants.

Cholesky (3 props, SPD construction A = X*X^T + n*I to bypass rejection sampling):
- prop_cholesky_reconstructs: L * L^T == A
- prop_cholesky_lower_triangular: L[i,j] == 0 for j > i
- prop_cholesky_positive_diagonal: L[i,i] > 0

LU (3 props, diag-dominant matrices to ensure non-singularity under partial pivoting):
- prop_lu_reconstructs: P * A == L * U
- prop_lu_l_unit_lower: L is unit lower-triangular
- prop_lu_u_upper: U is upper-triangular

Property test count grew 12 -> 18, each running 256 proptest cases. All passing, clippy clean. Commit 57f12df6.
